, Moveable , Nameable , Singleton public class DependencyHighlighter extends NodeControllerFactory This is an attribute that produces a custom node controller that adds context menu commands to highlight dependents and prerequisites. A dependent i

light dependents and prerequisites. A dependent is a downstream actor, and a prerequisite is an upstream actor. To use this, drop it onto any actor. The context menu (right click or command click) aquires four additional commands to highlight or c

aquires four additional commands to highlight or clear highlights on dependents or prerequisites. Since: Ptolemy II 6.1 Version: $Id: DependencyHighlighter.java,v 1.7 2007/12/07 06:15:30 cxh Exp $ Author: Edward A. Lee See Also: Serialized Form Acce
